security.label: GitHub repos are private
security.desc: Only accessible by approved operators and service accounts.

security.label: Secrets stay out of code
security.desc: API keys live in env vars, 1Password, or local ignored files.

security.label: Supabase RLS active
security.desc: Row-level security is enforced across the production data model.

security.label: Scoped GitHub token
security.desc: GitHub access is limited to the necessary repo scope.

security.label: Agents pull, do not broadly push
security.desc: Write paths are constrained to trusted operators and approved automations.

security.label: 2FA on critical services
security.desc: Core services use layered auth beyond password-only access.
